description: The IT Manager needs an XML data feed for a new ERP integration. Connect to the Oracle HR database (host=localhost, port=1521, database=XEPDB1, username=hr, password=hr123) to generate two XML files and a PL/SQL function. Generate an organizational hierarchy XML file at /home/ga/Desktop/org_structure.xml with a root <organization> element containing <department> elements (including 'id' attribute, <name>, <manager_name>, and an <employees> container for departments with employees). The <employees> container must include <employee> elements with 'id' attribute, <first_name>, <last_name>, <email>, <job_id>, <salary>, and <hire_date>. Generate a compensation statistics XML file at /home/ga/Desktop/compensation_feed.xml for jobs with employees, using a root <compensation_report> element containing <job> elements (including 'id' attribute, <title>, <min_salary>, <max_salary>, <employee_count>, <avg_actual_salary>, and <total_payroll>). Additionally, create a reusable PL/SQL function named 'GENERATE_DEPT_XML(p_dept_id IN NUMBER) RETURN XMLTYPE' in the HR schema that returns the XML structure for a single department matching the format used in the organizational hierarchy file.
